mapper.delete:
/* SQL ID : SrvyQstnVwitmLvlDAO.srvyQstnListVwitmLvlDelete 설 명 : 설문문항목록보기항목레벨삭제 */ DELETE FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID IN
#{item.srvyQstnId}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvyQstnVwitmLvlDAO.srvyQstnVwitmLvlList 설 명 : 설문문항보기항목레벨목록조회 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN_VWITM_LVL WHERE SRVY_QSTN_ID = #{srvyQstnId} ORDER BY LVL_SEQNO
